overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through a dystopian urban environment. The journey transitions from a trash-filled back alley behind a convenience store, through an open industrial plaza, along a street beneath an elevated highway, and finally into a crowded neon-lit market bazaar. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to warm morning sunlight and back to artificial market lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley behind convenience store with trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow trash-filled alleyway behind the Cali Express store

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the Cali Express entrance, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: corner convenience store with illuminated 'CALI EXPRESS' neon signage
accumulated garbage bags and debris stacked against the wall
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure overhead
large industrial shipping container with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow back alley behind the Cali Express convenience store. The character walks forward through scattered debris and trash piles accumulated along the concrete walls. An industrial overpass looms overhead, casting shadows across the scene. A single NPC stands near the store entrance as the character progresses toward the alley exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with construction barriers near industrial district

events.description: exits the narrow covered alley into a wide open plaza with morning sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across an open plaza area with red and white construction barriers

entered.detail: striped plastic construction barriers blocking off sections of the plaza
multi-story contemporary office building with reflective windows
tall factory smokestacks visible on the horizon against the morning sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a wide sunlit plaza. Red and white construction barriers dot the open concrete area. A modern glass building stands ahead while industrial chimneys rise in the distant background. The industrial overpass structure now appears to the left as the character walks toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with industrial views

events.description: turns left onto the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing black bollards

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise industrial structure with blue painted lower facade and large windows
row of black and orange traffic bollards lining the sidewalk edge
tall vertical advertising screen displaying monochrome graphics

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a sidewalk running beneath an elevated highway. The morning sun creates a lens flare as it shines through the concrete pillars. Black bollards line the path, and a blue industrial building stands to the right. In the distance, factory smokestacks punctuate the horizon while the character walks along the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: enters a narrow covered market alley with overhead pipes and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow market passage, passing food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at a food stall counter eating, wearing a sleeveless shirt

entered.detail: large yellow shipping container covered in black graffiti tags and street art
open-air food vendor with green plastic stools and counter seating
blue neon zigzag sign mounted on the wall
illuminated advertisement poster showing a woman with purple hair
dense network of industrial pipes, cables, and ductwork overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow market alley characterized by cyberpunk aesthetics. A yellow graffiti-covered container stands prominently on the left, while a food stall with green seats occupies the corner. Neon signs including a blue chevron pattern illuminate the passage. Overhead, a dense tangle of pipes and cables runs the length of the alley. A patron sits eating at the food counter as the character moves deeper into the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded indoor-outdoor market bazaar with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as the character enters the main market area

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd of shoppers and vendors in the market interior

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a clothing rack stall arranging merchandise
shopper walking past carrying bags, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: metal mesh roofing covering the market alley, filtering the light
market stall with racks of hanging clothes and merchandise displays
steep metal staircase leading to an upper level or rooftop
large screen displaying advertisement with text 'FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS' and red imagery

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the heart of the market, where the crowd density increases significantly. The passage is now covered by an overhead metal mesh canopy. Various market stalls line both sides, including a clothing vendor on the left. A prominent digital billboard overhead displays 'FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS' in bold letters. Metal stairs lead upward on the right as the character navigates through the bustling crowd of shoppers and vendors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, shadowed back alley into a sprawling, neon-lit urban market. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage filled with debris and trash behind a convenience store, moving beneath the heavy shadow of an industrial overpass. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit plaza featuring construction barriers and distant industrial chimneys before shifting toward a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway where morning sunlight creates a lens flare. The environment then transitions from the open brightness of the street into a narrow, cyberpunk alleyway defined by yellow graffiti, neon signs, and a dense tangle of overhead cables. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the heart of a bustling market, moving under a metal mesh canopy and past digital billboards and clothing vendors as the crowd density increases.
